# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build
        id: build

      - name: Create artifact
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifact
          cp -r build/* artifact/
        id: create_artifact
        env:
          GITHUB_WORKSPACE: ${{ github.workspace }}

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: artifact
          path: artifact/

  deploy_stage_1:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: artifact

      - name: Execute deployment script for Stage 1
        run: ./deploy_stage_1.sh

  deploy_stage_2:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_stage_1
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: artifact

      - name: Execute deployment script for Stage 2
        run: ./deploy_stage_2.sh
